clinical_summary: Report generated from structured agent outputs after outlier removal. Retained lab evidence: Creatinine 1.66 (high), Lactate 2.49 (high), WBC 13.57 (high). LLM synthesis unavailable.

prioritized_risks.explanation: SEPSIS_RISK matched: hypotension, altered mental status, oliguria, lactate > 2 mmol/L, WBC > 12 K/uL, creatinine elevated. Guideline from Sepsis-3 Consensus Definitions supports this risk. Evidence: SECTION 1 Sepsis-3 Definitions and Diagnostic Criteria Source: Singer M, et al. The Third International Consensus Definitions for Sepsis and Septic Shock (Sepsis-3). JAMA. 2016;315
prioritized_risks.threshold: Sepsis-3: suspected infection plus acute SOFA increase >= 2

prioritized_risks.explanation: SEPTIC_SHOCK_RISK matched: persistent hypotension, lactate > 2 mmol/L. Guideline from Septic Shock Identification and Management supports this risk. Evidence: Septic shock requires sepsis plus persistent hypotension needing vasopressors to maintain MAP >=65 mmHg and lactate >2 mmol/L despite adequate fluid resuscitation.
prioritized_risks.threshold: Septic shock: vasopressor-dependent MAP >= 65 with lactate > 2 mmol/L after fluids

prioritized_risks.explanation: AKI_RISK matched: oliguria, creatinine elevated. Guideline from KDIGO AKI Guidelines 2012 supports this risk. Evidence: KDIGO AKI definition: creatinine rise >=0.3 mg/dL in 48 hours, or >=1.5x baseline in 7 days, or urine output <0.5 mL/kg/hour for >=6 hours.
prioritized_risks.threshold: KDIGO AKI: creatinine rise >= 0.3 mg/dL in 48h or urine output < 0.5 mL/kg/hr for >= 6h

prioritized_risks.explanation: EARLY_WARNING_ESCALATION matched: hypotension, altered mental status, tachycardia. Guideline from NEWS2 Early Warning Score supports this risk. Evidence: SECTION 9 National Early Warning Score 2 (NEWS2) Source: Royal College of Physicians. National Early Warning Score (NEWS) 2. Updated report of a working party. London: RCP, 2017. 9
prioritized_risks.threshold: NEWS2 high risk: score >= 7 or any single severe parameter

recommended_actions: Review prioritized risks with attending clinician.
Cross-check retained labs against bedside observation.
Reassess on next clinical review cycle.
doctor_handoff: LLM synthesis failed — report built from structured data only. Manual review of raw agent outputs is advised.
